item.title: First Post
item.description:
Creating this site

I’ve always wanted to have my own site, now here I am, procrastinating a homework assignment by researching topics beyond what my class is teaching lol. Welcome to agast.net

Heres a short little write-up for practice & documentation

Tools & Sites Used

Hugo : Framework for website

Cloudflare Pages : Website deployment

GitHub / Git : Repo storage, and git to push updates

panr’s terminal theme for hugo

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Education

AAS in Cybersecurity - Saint Louis Community College (2024 - 2026)

  • Cybersecurity Technology & Networking Club - Former President
  • Archer Defenders Cybersecurity Team - Former Team Captain
  • Phi Theta Kappa Honors Society - Member

BS in Cybersecurity (IST Emphasis) - UMSL (Fall 2026 - 2028)

  • Pierre Laclede Honors College

Certifications

  • CompTIA Security+ - WIP (Target: July 2026)

Experience

STEM Tutor @ STLCC (August 2025 - Present)

  • Assisted college students in learning Python, C#, Java and breaking down complex networking topics. Helped multiple students move from failing grades to achieving an ‘A’ through structured logic and hands-on practice.

National Cyber League (NCL) Fall 2025

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Education

AAS in Cybersecurity - Saint Louis Community College, 2024-2026

  • Cybersecurity Technology & Networking Club - Former President
  • Archer Defenders Cybersecurity Team - Former Team Captain
  • Phi Theta Kappa Honors Society - Member

BS in Cybersecurity with Emphasis in IST - University of Missouri Saint Louis, Fall 2026 - 2028

  • Pierre Laclede Honors College

Certifications

WIP - Sec+ , July 2026

Experience

Stem Tutor @ Saint Louis Community College

August 2025 - Present

Assisted students in essential studying skills, along with breaking down complex topics into easily understandable parts. Success stories include students coming in completely lost in Python classes, and after a few sessions, going on to achieving an A in the class.
